title: Optimization:
content:
Optimization:
• Preload tutorial assets during app launch to avoid stuttering.
• Use object pooling for ghost checkers and animated trails to reduce instantiation overhead.
• Cache frequently accessed lore content locally to minimize backend queries.
Challenges to Mitigate:
• Balance tutorial depth with pacing—offer a “Quick Play” mode bypassing onboarding.
• Ensure philosophical prompts are optional to avoid disrupting casual gameplay.
4. The Archivist AI Chaperone
Approach:
• Diegetic Presence: Model the Archivist as a low-poly 3D avatar (robed figure or hologram) using Unity’s Animator. Place it subtly in the scene (e.g., corner of the board) to avoid clutter.
• Visual Cues: Highlight valid moves with glowing outlines (via Shader Graph) and animated arrows. Use a lightweight state machine for hint logic, avoiding heavy AI inference.
• Voice Customization: Offer three voice personas (grandparent, philosopher, child) using TTS (e.g., AWS Polly) with pre-recorded fallbacks for offline play.
• Socratic Dialog: Implement mid-game prompts as 3D speech bubbles, triggered by game state (e.g., risky move). Limit frequency to avoid annoyance.
